summary: A/B Testing for Story Hooks feature testing complete. Backend: 100% pass rate (21/21 tests). Frontend: 100% pass rate. All 4 hook variants (mystery, emotional, shock, curiosity) are correctly defined and tracked. The /api/ab/hook-analytics endpoint returns per-variant metrics (impressions, clicks, CTR, continues, continue_rate, shares, share_rate, sufficient_data, data_warning). Public share pages display A/B tested hook variants with variant-specific section_label, hook_suffix, cta_text, and accent colors. Dashboard trending cards use hook variant CTA text and urgency text. Admin Hook A/B tab shows all 4 variants with metrics grid and confidence warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/ab/hook-analytics returns 4 variants with all required metrics: impressions, clicks, ctr, continues, continue_rate, shares, share_rate, sufficient_data, data_warning
POST /api/ab/assign-all returns story_hook variant assignment with variant_data containing: style, section_label, hook_suffix, cta_text, urgency, accent
POST /api/ab/convert tracks impression, click, continue_click, share_click events for story_hook experiment
POST /api/ab/convert correctly deduplicates events (same session+experiment+event returns dedupe:true)
Public share page (/v/{slug}) fetches A/B variant via getVariant('story_hook') and displays variant-specific UI
Public share page tracks impression on load via trackConversion('story_hook', 'impression')
Public share page tracks share_click when share buttons are clicked via trackConversion('story_hook', 'share_click')
Public share page tracks continue_click on Continue button click via trackConversion('story_hook', 'continue_click')
Dashboard trending story cards use hookVariant.variant_data.cta_text and hookVariant.variant_data.urgency
Dashboard StoryCard tracks click and continue_click on card click via trackConversion('story_hook', 'click') and trackConversion('story_hook', 'continue_click')
Admin Hook A/B tab (section=hook_ab) shows all 4 variants with metrics grid
Admin Hook A/B section shows 'Collecting data...' badge when no top_performer (insufficient data)
Admin Hook A/B section shows confidence warnings per variant when impressions < 50 (min_sample_size)
Admin summary cards show Total Impressions, Best CTR, Best Continue %, Best Share % calculated from variants array
seed_data_creation: Test data generated via pytest for sessions test_session_*, test_convert_*, test_dedupe_*, etc. Hook analytics shows real data for all 4 variants.
context_for_next_testing_agent: A/B Testing for Story Hooks fully verified. All 13 features tested: (1) /api/ab/hook-analytics returns 4 variants with metrics, (2) /api/ab/assign-all returns story_hook variant with variant_data, (3) /api/ab/convert tracks impression/click/continue_click/share_click, (4) Deduplication works (dedupe:true on repeat), (5) Public page displays variant-specific section_label/hook_suffix/cta_text, (6) Public page tracks impression on load, (7) Public page tracks share_click on share buttons, (8) Public page tracks continue_click on Continue button, (9) Dashboard cards use variant cta_text/urgency, (10) Dashboard tracks click/continue_click, (11) Admin Hook A/B tab shows 4 variants, (12) Admin shows 'Collecting data...' badge, (13) Admin shows confidence warnings. Current analytics: Mystery (4 sessions, 2 impressions), Emotional (7 sessions, 3 impressions), Shock (9 sessions, 5 impressions), Curiosity (3 sessions, 1 impression).

Feature_1_Hook_Analytics_Returns_4_Varia.details: GET /api/ab/hook-analytics returns 4 variants: hook_mystery, hook_emotional, hook_shock, hook_curiosity

Feature_2_Hook_Analytics_Variant_Metrics.details: Each variant has: impressions, clicks, ctr, continues, continue_rate, shares, share_rate, sufficient_data, data_warning

Feature_3_Assign_All_Returns_Story_Hook.details: POST /api/ab/assign-all returns story_hook variant with variant_data containing style, section_label, hook_suffix, cta_text, urgency, accent

Feature_4_Convert_Tracks_All_Events.details: POST /api/ab/convert tracks impression, click, continue_click, share_click events

Feature_5_Convert_Deduplication.details: Same session+experiment+event returns {success: true, dedupe: true}

Feature_6_Public_Page_Displays_Variant.details: Public share page shows variant-specific section_label, hook_suffix, cta_text based on assigned variant

Feature_8_Public_Page_Tracks_Share_Click.details: trackConversion('story_hook', 'share_click') called when share buttons clicked

Feature_9_Public_Page_Tracks_Continue_Cl.details: trackConversion('story_hook', 'continue_click') called when Continue button clicked

Feature_10_Dashboard_Uses_Variant_CTA.details: Dashboard StoryCard uses hookVariant.variant_data.cta_text and urgency

Feature_11_Admin_Hook_AB_Tab.details: Admin Dashboard Hook A/B tab shows all 4 variants with metrics grid

Feature_12_Admin_Collecting_Data_Badge.details: Shows 'Collecting data...' badge when no top_performer (insufficient data)

Feature_13_Admin_Confidence_Warnings.details: Shows 'Need X more impressions for reliable rates' when impressions < 50

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real. No mocking.
